mapper.insert: insert into employee(name, username, password, phone, sex, id_number, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user) values (#{name}, #{username}, #{password}, #{phone}, #{sex}, #{idNumber}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser})
mapper.update:
update employee
name = #{name},
username = #{username},
password = #{password},
phone = #{phone},
sex = #{sex},
id_number = #{idNumber},
create_time = #{createTime},
update_time = #{updateTime},
create_user = #{createUser},
update_user = #{updateUser},
status = #{status}
where id= #{id}
mapper.select:
select id, name, username, password, phone, sex, id_number, status, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user from employee
and name like concat('%', #{name}, '%')
order by update_time desc
select id, name, username, password, phone, sex, id_number, status, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user from employee where id = #{id}
